description_long: This house features a striking angular roof design with multiple intersecting planes, predominantly clad in teal-colored panels. The structure sits on a rectangular black base, with geometric cutouts and sharp lines giving it a modern, almost abstract appearance. The roof is composed of several overlapping sections, creating a dynamic, multi-faceted look. Windows are irregularly placed, with some large, angular openings visible on the sides, contributing to an asymmetrical facade. The entryway appears to be integrated into the angular geometry, with no traditional porch or steps visible, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic. The overall form and color palette suggest a bold, modern architectural style suited for an urban environment.
description: A modern house with a multi-faceted teal roof, angular lines, and asymmetrical window placement on a black base. Its bold geometric design and minimal entryway highlight a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the complex, angular teal roof and a large, jagged window cutout on the facade.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the layered roof planes and the main entry area, with minimal visible windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing additional angular roof sections and another large, irregular window opening.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back roof slopes and a mostly solid facade with few window features.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist integrated entryway with no visible porch or steps, blending into the angular facade
